members.name: Christian Vari
members.description: Christian Vari is a blockchain security researcher and smart contract auditor specializing in DeFi, Layer 1 protocols, and decentralized systems. With 100+ audits across Substrate, Cosmos SDK, CosmWasm, Solana, and EVM chains, he helps Web3 teams launch secure, scalable, and resilient products.
